title: Pete Hammond's Oscar Predictions: What The Academy Voted For
text: Pete Hammond forecasts that Anderson will claim victory despite potential momentum for competitor Coogler. Hammond notes that Anderson has won the major precursor awards: "DGA, Golden Globe and Critics Choice winner, and 14-time Oscar nominee long overdue, this seems an easy call." However, Hammond acknowledges a possible upset scenario. If "Sinners" experiences a significant sweep across categories, Coogler could potentially become "the first-ever Black winner in this category," representing historic significance. The prediction reflects Anderson's strong positioning through the awards season while acknowledging the underlying suspense around whether the film's overall dominance might be disrupted.
